human_actions_pending.action: Manual UAT testing of Teacher Analytics heatmap and navigation
human_actions_pending.context: Verify: 1) 'Phân tích học tập' menu in drawer. 2) Heatmap shows assignment titles (Y), 4 buckets (X), colored cells. 3) Max 5 rows, scrolls. 4) Navigation from drawer works.

human_actions_pending.action: Fix UAT test 3: Student Analytics metric cards - thang diem /10 instead of %
human_actions_pending.context: ScoreDisplayUtils.toPercent() converts /10 to %. Need to show raw /10 score (e.g., '7.5') not '75%'. Also add trend indicator arrows.

human_actions_pending.action: Fix UAT test 5: Time filter bottom sheet for Student Analytics
human_actions_pending.context: Time range selector chips only affect line chart, not metric cards. Need: bottom sheet with custom date range, filter connects to all data.

decisions.decision: Heatmap Y-axis = assignment title (from assignments.title), not subject (from classes.subject)
decisions.rationale: User reported môn học nhầm → actually wanted bài tập names

decisions.decision: Heatmap score scale = thang diem 10, buckets: 0-4, 4-6, 6-8, 8-10
decisions.rationale: User said 'thang diem 10, bo bot 1 so 0 tren thang 100'. Internal normalizes to % for bucket comparison, display uses /10 labels.

decisions.decision: Heatmap shows max 5 rows, scrollable inside fixed white card container with shadow
decisions.rationale: User: 'hien thi 5 mon hoc tro xuong, chi hien thi trong khung do'. SingleChildScrollView inside sized Container.

decisions.decision: _buildDistributionInfoMap filters by classId, ORDER BY created_at DESC
decisions.rationale: Linter/user auto-fixed to filter distributions by classId only. ORDER BY created_at DESC = newest first.

next_action: Commit all uncommitted changes as WIP, then resume when review agents return. flutter analyze is clean (0 errors, 0 warnings).
